title: Silhouette Sketch Pens
excerpt: I had the pleasure of playing with the Silhouette Sketch Pens, which as it turns out, is a very cool product! Look at all the fabulous colors… It was easy to use too. I simply took my blade out, and…
body:
I had the pleasure of playing with the Silhouette Sketch Pens, which as it turns out, is a very cool product! Look at all the fabulous colors…

Yes, that's Buster the little mischief maker bringing an orange from the backyard inside to try and get me to play with him. Can't he see that I'm working?! (wink)

The sketch pens come with a download card for some free exclusive designs. Other supplies: Thickers || 4x6 card by Pebbles || Washi Tape || Basic Grey stickers

Visit Silhouette and use the promo code: TANGERINE through March 31 to get any of these:(1) 1 Silhouette CAMEO® and sketch pen starter kit: $269.99 (2) 1 Silhouette Portrait™ and sketch pen starter kit: $139.99 (3) Sketch pen starter kit: $12.99

If you haven't caved just yet, perhaps this is a good time - these are some great products! Please click here to take advantage of this month’s discount and don’t forget to enter TANGERINE as the promo code valid through March 31.

Once again, Silhouette wants to give one of you - my dear readers - a Silhouette Portrait™!

GIVEAWAY: Sorry - I had to close the giveaway by 3/28 which is today, thanks so much for all your comments. To enter, just leave a fun comment! Giveaway will close on Saturday, March 30th at 8am and a random winner will be selected and announced here shortly after. Good luck everyone! THE WINNER IS #130 - Kelly M says: March 26, 2013 at 11:04 am

Thanks for the giveaway, Amy! 

CONGRATS! And thanks everyone for entering - remember you can still use the discount code TANGERINE through March 31!
